title: Dekton Rigger Glove
features: Heavy duty general purpose rigger gloves
thick cotton and leather palms & finger tips
Available in one size to fit all
Red and Grey with grey leather palms
description: From the manufacturer ONE SIZE FITS ALL RIGGER GLOVES Quality leather with stiff rubberised cuff and red drill backing. A superior quality rigger glove made from 1 to 1.2mm thick leather with a heavy red drill backing. Pasted cuff, leather wing thumb and first finger with an elasticated back and leather knuckle protection. Comfort is further improved by a soft fleece lining on the front of the palm and fingers. Suitable for traditional general purpose industrial applications. Ideal for agriculture, construction, warehousing, transport and logistics, local authorities, engineering and manufacturing. CE CAT II. ADVANCED FEATURES FULLY TESTED AND CERTIFIED Fully tested and certified. CE CAT II. QUALITY LEATHER WITH STIFF RUBBERISED CUFF & RED DRILL BACKING A superior quality rigger glove made from 1 to 1.2mm thick leather with a heavy red drill backing. Pasted cuff, leather wing thumb and first finger with an elasticated back and leather knuckle protection. Comfort is further improved by a soft fleece lining on the front of the palm and fingers. ONE SIZE FITS ALL One size fits all. IDEAL FOR: Agriculture. Construction. Warehousing. Transport and logistics. Local authorities. Engineering. Manufacturing. Where extra protection is required.
